reviews.comment:

There is nothing left to say about ACA, they are wonderful.

reviews.comment:
Toda la gente de las islas y del cafe son maravillosos, de muy buen humor siempre y dispuestos a dar una mano en lo que se necesite para su vehiculo.  Muy buen cafe y medialunas !!!!

(Translated by Google)
Everyone on the islands and at the café is wonderful, always in a great mood and willing to lend a hand with anything you need for your vehicle. Excellent coffee and croissants!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2511053987051317301/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNpd3VUVTZ3RRAB

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
A good station that stands the test of time
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2511053987051317301/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURxd2FYRjBRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Tres estrellas por ser YPF, pero los empleados tenían menos ganas de atender que mi abuelita muerta. Y además parecían tener menos ganas de cargarle a las motos, por qué estuve esperando en el surtidor .ir tras le cargaban a autos que llegaron después que yo!!

(Translated by Google)
Three stars because it's a YPF station, but the employees were less helpful than my dead grandmother. And they seemed even less inclined to fill up motorcycles, because I was waiting at the pump behind them. They were filling up cars that arrived after me!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2511053987051317301/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURxbXB5eEpBEAE

reviews.comment:
Un lugar para cargar combustible solo si hay una emergencia... Siempre que fui fueron muy lentos para atender... Charlan entre los playeros cómo si no hubiesen clientes.. te despachan... No te atienden

(Translated by Google)
A place to refuel only if there's an emergency... Every time I've gone, the service has been incredibly slow... The attendants chat amongst themselves as if there were no customers... They rush you out... They don't really help you.
